I now have the canonical `AuditSink` selector and implementor list from the graph. I’m doing a source-level cross-check on each candidate file to separate true constructors from enum declarations/pattern matches.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` when a requested tool is not in the allowlist (before dispatching the tool call).
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes a new `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` (`let denial = ...`) when enforcement sees a disallowed `ToolCallRequested` and then emits it via `inner.emit(&denial)`.

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
